news.t: AllianceBernstein Enhances ETF Offerings with Two New Fixed Income Conversions

overview.description: The AB New York Intermediate Municipal ETF (NYM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in New York municipal bonds, whose interests are exempt from federal, state, and local income taxes. The portfolio seeks to maintain an effective duration of 3.5 to 7 years NYM was launched on Nov 10, 2025 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Enhances ETF Offerings with Two New Fixed Income Conversions
data.text: NASHVILLE, Tenn. , Nov. 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- AllianceBernstein Holding L.P.
